# PromptDiff — Full Reference

> Compare LLM outputs across models with one API call.

PromptDiff is a developer API that compares outputs from multiple large language models simultaneously. Send one request with your prompt and a list of model IDs, and receive structured results showing each model's output, latency in milliseconds, token usage, and exact cost in USD.

## Product Summary
- Name: PromptDiff
- Category: Developer API / LLM benchmarking tool
- Website: https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com
- Built by: Bizmarq (https://bizmarq.com)
- Authentication: Bearer token (API key prefix: pd_)

## Supported Models

| Model ID           | Provider  | Input (per 1M tokens) | Output (per 1M tokens) | Free Tier |
|--------------------|-----------|----------------------|------------------------|-----------|
| claude-sonnet-4-6  | Anthropic | $3.00                | $15.00                 | No        |
| claude-haiku-4-5   | Anthropic | $0.80                | $4.00                  | Yes       |
| gpt-4o             | OpenAI    | $5.00                | $15.00                 | No        |
| gpt-4o-mini        | OpenAI    | $0.15                | $0.60                  | Yes       |
| gemini-2.5-pro     | Google    | $1.25                | $10.00                 | No        |
| gemini-2.5-flash   | Google    | $0.15                | $0.60                  | Yes       |
| grok-3             | xAI       | $3.00                | $15.00                 | No        |
| grok-3-mini        | xAI       | $0.30                | $0.50                  | Yes       |

Prices reflect underlying LLM provider costs. PromptDiff adds a 40% margin. Always query GET /v1/models for current pricing.

## Pricing Model
- Free tier: 100 evaluations per month — mini models only (claude-haiku-4-5, gpt-4o-mini, gemini-2.5-flash, grok-3-mini)
- No credit card required for free tier
- Paid: LLM API cost + 40% margin, pay-as-you-go
- Monthly spend limit: configurable per account

## API Reference

### POST /v1/compare
Compare a prompt across multiple LLM models in parallel.

Endpoint: https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/compare
Method: POST
Authentication: Bearer token required

Request body (JSON):
```
{
  "prompt": "string (required) — The prompt to send to each model",
  "models": ["string"] (required) — Array of model IDs from GET /v1/models",
  "input": "string (optional) — Input variable injected into the prompt context",
  "options": {
    "temperature": "number (optional, 0–2, default 0.7)",
    "max_tokens": "number (optional, default 500)"
  }
}
```

Response body (JSON):
```
{
  "eval_id": "string — Unique evaluation ID (prefix: eval_)",
  "results": [
    {
      "model": "string — Model ID",
      "provider": "string — Provider name",
      "output": "string — Model's text output",
      "latency_ms": "number — End-to-end latency in milliseconds",
      "cost_usd": "number — Cost for this result in USD",
      "input_tokens": "number",
      "output_tokens": "number",
      "total_tokens": "number"
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "total_cost_usd": "number — Sum of all model costs",
    "fastest_model": "string — Model ID with lowest latency",
    "cheapest_model": "string — Model ID with lowest cost",
    "created_at": "string — ISO 8601 timestamp"
  }
}
```

### GET /v1/models
List all available LLM models and their current pricing.

Endpoint: https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/models
Method: GET
Authentication: Bearer token required

Response body (JSON):
```
{
  "models": [
    {
      "id": "string — Model ID to use in /v1/compare requests",
      "name": "string — Human-readable model name",
      "provider": "string — Provider name",
      "input_per_1m": "number — Input cost per 1M tokens in USD",
      "output_per_1m": "number — Output cost per 1M tokens in USD"
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /v1/evals
List past evaluations or retrieve a specific eval by ID.

Endpoints:
- GET https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/evals — list evals
- GET https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/evals/:id — get single eval

Query parameters (list endpoint):
- limit: number (optional, default 20, max 100)
- offset: number (optional, default 0)

### GET /v1/usage
Get current month usage and billing information.

Endpoint: https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/usage
Method: GET
Authentication: Bearer token required

Query parameters:
- month: string (optional, format YYYY-MM, defaults to current month)

Response includes: eval_count, total_charge_usd, free_evals_remaining, has_payment_method, pricing details.

## SDK Examples

### Python SDK
```python
from promptdiff import PromptDiff

pd = PromptDiff(api_key="pd_your_api_key")

result = pd.compare(
    prompt="Explain async/await in JavaScript.",
    models=["gpt-4o-mini", "claude-haiku-4-5", "gemini-2.5-flash"],
)

for r in result.results:
    print(r.model, r.latency_ms, r.cost_usd)
    print(r.output[:100])
```

### TypeScript SDK
```typescript
import { PromptDiff } from 'promptdiff';

const pd = new PromptDiff({ apiKey: 'pd_your_api_key' });

const result = await pd.compare({
  prompt: 'Explain async/await in JavaScript.',
  models: ['gpt-4o-mini', 'claude-haiku-4-5', 'gemini-2.5-flash'],
  temperature: 0.7,
  maxTokens: 300,
});

for (const r of result.results) {
  console.log(r.model, r.latencyMs, r.costUsd);
  console.log(r.output.slice(0, 100));
}
```

### curl
```bash
curl -X POST https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/compare \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer pd_your_api_key" \
  -d '{
    "prompt": "What is the capital of France?",
    "models": ["gpt-4o-mini", "claude-haiku-4-5", "gemini-2.5-flash", "grok-3-mini"]
  }'
```

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is PromptDiff?
A: PromptDiff is an API that compares LLM outputs across multiple models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Grok) with a single API call. It returns structured results including output text, latency, cost, and token usage for each model.

Q: How much does PromptDiff cost?
A: PromptDiff offers 100 free evaluations per month with no credit card required. After the free tier, pricing is based on actual LLM API costs plus a 40% margin. Mini models (Claude Haiku, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini Flash, Grok Mini) are available in the free tier.

Q: Which LLM models does PromptDiff support?
A: PromptDiff supports 8 models from 4 providers: Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Haiku 4.5 (Anthropic), GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini (OpenAI), Gemini 2.5 Pro and Flash (Google), and Grok 3 and Grok 3 Mini (xAI).

Q: Does PromptDiff have an SDK?
A: Yes, PromptDiff provides both Python and TypeScript SDKs. You can also use the REST API directly with any HTTP client like curl or fetch.

Q: Is there a rate limit?
A: Free tier users can run up to 100 evaluations per month using mini models. Paid users can configure a monthly spend limit. Contact support for higher rate limits.

Q: How does PromptDiff handle my prompts?
A: Prompts are forwarded to the selected LLM providers and stored for your eval history (retrievable via GET /v1/evals). See the privacy policy for full details.
